headline: Is Mastercard (MA) Offering Value After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Mastercard's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article will walk you through what the numbers say about value. The stock last closed at US$491.14, with a 1.2% decline over 7 days, a 5.9% decline over 30 days and a 12.8% decline year to date, while the 1-year return stands at a 7.9% decline and the 3- and 5-year returns are both 41.0%. Recent coverage has focused on Mastercard's role as a major payments network and its exposure...
